Trim woody stalk off of all asparagus - line up the tips of the spears and cut uniformly
In a pot of water with a rolling boil, season the water with a ratio of 10g to each litre of water used.
Blanch asparagus for ~2 minuts or until bright green, par cooked but not soft, and still a light bite (al dente)
Reserve to sheet trays with resting racks to dry, cool in blast chiller
Reserve to perforated hotel pans-lined deep hotel pans, to prevent moisture build up
